positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a mystical forest creature—a luminous fox with electric blue fur and emerald green eyes, sitting in a cross-legged, regal pose. The fox is surrounded by floating, bioluminescent leaves and delicate crystal structures. Composition is centered and symmetrical, emphasizing the fox's silhouette and the high contrast between the deep, velvety forest background and the vibrant, neon glow of the flora. Studio-quality print art, perfect for an apparel repeat pattern, clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic, highly detailed, volumetric lighting, deep shadows, complementary cyan and emerald color palette.
negative: photorealistic, noisy, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, low quality, jpeg artifacts, grain
